skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music to produce short videos (5-120 seconds)
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer flagged 534 potential security issues, but after semantic evaluation, all findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill is a legitimate API integration for video creation. It uses shell scripts for API communication with the pexo.ai service. Shell command patterns flagged in markdown files are documentation of script usage, not code execution vulnerabilities. Network access is limited to the official pexo.ai API endpoint. Environment variable access (PEXO_API_KEY) is standard API authentication, not credential harvesting. Filesystem access uses standard config directories (~/.pexo/). No malicious behavior or data exfiltration detected.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Documentation in Markdown Files
medium_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged 349 occurrences of 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' in markdown files (SKILL.md, SETUP-CHECKLIST.md, TROUBLESHOOTING.md). These are documentation examples showing how to use the shell scripts, not actual code execution vulnerabilities. The backticks appear in code blocks within markdown documentation.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged patterns are inside markdown code blocks, which are documentation. No actual command injection vectors exist in the actual shell scripts which use proper argument quoting.

medium_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Authentication
medium_findings.description: The skill reads PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL environment variables for API authentication. This is standard practice for third-party API integration and is not credential harvesting.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The API key is used exclusively for authenticating requests to the official pexo.ai API service. The key is never exfiltrated or sent to any other endpoint.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs for Official Service
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged 'Hardcoded URL' patterns for pexo.ai domain. These are legitimate endpoints for the video creation service.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All hardcoded URLs point to the official pexo.ai service. No suspicious external domains are referenced.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Access to Configuration Directory
low_findings.description: The skill accesses ~/.pexo/config and ~/.pexo/tmp for configuration and temporary storage. This is standard CLI tool behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard configuration directory usage for CLI tools. No sensitive system files are accessed.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Creating short videos for social media and advertising requires specialized skills in cinematography, pacing, and storytelling. Pexo AI handles all creative work—scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music—so you can produce professional videos in minutes.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) with aspect ratios 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1
Handle full video production workflow: scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, music selection
Upload and incorporate user-provided images, videos, and audio assets into generated content
Support revisions and feedback loops to refine video output
Present multiple preview options for user selection
Deliver final video with downloadable URL and project link
limitations: Requires PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL environment variables to be configured
Production time is 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex or longer content
Cannot process web URLs for assets; files must be downloaded and uploaded locally
Requires curl, jq, and file commands to be available in the environment

use_cases.title: Create product advertisements
use_cases.description: Generate polished product ad videos from a brief description or uploaded product images. Perfect for e-commerce sellers and brands needing quick advertising content.
use_cases.target_user: E-commerce sellers, marketing teams, small business owners

use_cases.title: Produce social media content
use_cases.description: Create engaging TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content with AI-generated video, transitions, and background music from text descriptions.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators, social media managers, influencers

use_cases.title: Generate explainer and tutorial videos
use_cases.description: Produce short explainer videos for product features, company services, or educational content from written descriptions.

prompt_templates.title: Basic video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I need a short video about [topic description]. Can you create it?
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - simple video creation request with clear topic

prompt_templates.title: Video with uploaded assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a product video using the attached image. The product is [product name] and I want to highlight [key feature].
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - video creation with user-provided assets

prompt_templates.title: Specific style and format
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [aspect ratio: 16:9/9:16/1:1] video for [platform: TikTok/Instagram/YouTube] about [topic]. Style: [energetic/calm/professional], duration around [seconds] seconds.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - detailed specifications for platform-specific content

prompt_templates.title: Revise existing video
prompt_templates.prompt: Make the video more [specific change, e.g., faster paced, more professional tone, different music style]. Keep the same general concept but improve [specific aspect].
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - iteration and refinement of previous output

output_examples.input: Create a product video for running shoes
output_examples.output:
Video generation request submitted to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes.

Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

Please wait while the video is being created. You will receive a preview for approval before final delivery.

output_examples.input: I want an Instagram Reels about coffee
output_examples.output:
Your request has been sent to Pexo AI.

Format: 9:16 (vertical) for Instagram Reels
Estimated completion: 15-20 minutes

Track progress: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xyz789

Feedback sent to Pexo. The video will be revised with a more professional tone.

You will receive an updated preview shortly.

best_practices: Be specific about the video purpose and target audience in your request
Upload reference images or brand assets when available for better results
Provide feedback on preview options to guide the final output
Wait for the full processing time (15-20 minutes) before requesting changes
anti_patterns: Do not add technical parameters (duration, aspect ratio) that the user did not specify - let Pexo make creative decisions
Do not send partial or vague requests then add details in follow-up messages - consolidate into one message
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT state - this triggers duplicate video generation

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-30 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take longer.

faq.question: What file formats can I upload?
faq.answer: Supported uploads: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), Videos (mp4, mov, avi), Audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac).

faq.question: Can Pexo access files from web URLs?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot crawl web URLs. You must download files locally first, then upload them.

faq.question: How do I make revisions to a video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id and send your feedback via pexo-chat.sh. The revision will be applied to the existing video.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: When commands fail with credit-related errors, you will receive a link to purchase credits at pexo.ai. After adding credits, retry the failed step.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Pexo supports 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical), and 1:1 (square) aspect ratios for video output.
